zh.lifeSummary: 當Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom於1073年7月4日出生在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯時，他的父親Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton42歲，母親Marigard Godwinesdatter40歲。他於1090年與Helga de Briquessart在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1095年1月9日在他的家鄉享年21歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom于1073年7月4日出生在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯时，他的父亲Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton42岁，母亲Marigard Godwinesdatter40岁。他于1090年与Helga de Briquessart在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1095年1月9日在他的家乡享年21岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: Lathom
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Latham
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

nameMeanings.name: Siward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Sinhard, composed of the elements sin ‘old’ (later ‘sense, opinion’) and hard ‘hard, strong’. Compare Siniard and Sinyard .

variants.name: Seney
meanings: from a pet form of the personal name of ancient Germanic origin Senard, which is a variant of Sinard .
variant of Sené ‘wise, sensible’ (see Sene ). The surname Seney, probably of the same origin, is also found in France (mainly Seine-Maritime). Compare Senay , Senna 4, and Snay 2.

variants.name: Siniard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Andre.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom was born on 4 July 1073, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, his father, Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton, was 42 and his mother, Marigard Godwinesdatter, was 40. He married Helga de Briquessart in 1090, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 January 1095, in his hometown, at the age of 21, and was buried in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom est né le 4 juillet 1073, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Marigard Godwinesdatter, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Helga de Briquessart en 1090, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1095, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom am 4. Juli 1073 in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton 42 und seine Mutter Marigard Godwinesdatter 40. Er hat 1090 in England Helga de Briquessart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1095 im Alter von 21 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom è nato il il 4 luglio 1073 nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Marigard Godwinesdatter, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Helga de Briquessart nel 1090, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1095, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 21 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathomが1073年7月4日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで生まれた時，父Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singletonは42歳，母Marigard Godwinesdatterは40歳であった。1090年にイギリスでHelga de Briquessartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1095年1月9日に故郷で21歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom(이)가 1073년 7월 4일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Marigard Godwinesdatter(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1090년 영국에서 Helga de Briquessart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1095년 1월 9일 그의 고향에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Lathom, Lancashire, England: Lathom, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.4 July 1073–9 January 1095: 4 de julho de 1073–9 de janeiro de 1095
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom nasceu em 4 de julho de 1073, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Marigard Godwinesdatter, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Helga de Briquessart em 1090, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1095, em sua cidade natal, com 21 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom родился 4 июля 1073 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Marigard Godwinesdatter, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Helga de Briquessart в 1090 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 января 1095 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 21 год и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.4 July 1073–9 January 1095: 4 de julio de 1073–9 de enero de 1095
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom nació el 4 de julio de 1073, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Dunnick FitzUghtred , 1st Earl of Lathom, de Singleton, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Marigard Godwinesdatter, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Helga de Briquessart en 1090, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1095, en su pueblo, a la edad de 21 años, y fue sepultado en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
